buildCommand: npm run build --workspace=@pokerbotai/shared && node_modules/.bin/vite build --root apps/web
installCommand: echo CWD=$(pwd) && ls -la && rm -f package-lock.json && npm install && echo '=== POST INSTALL ===' && ls node_modules/ | head -20 && echo '=== BIN ===' && find . -name '.bin' -type d 2>/dev/null | head -10
